provenance.source: HUD USER — U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development
provenance.dataset: USPS ZIP Code Crosswalk — ZIP↔County (crosswalk_type: zip-county)
provenance.resolution_method: ZIP-as-ZCTA: each USPS ZIP is used directly as its ACS ZCTA5 for the B19001 income pull. HUD provides NO ZCTA geography (only county/tract/CBSA/CD/countysub); ZCTA5 labels match the predominant ZIP digits. Verified against Marin ZIP 94901/94903/94904 → ACS 2024 ZCTA household counts. See ops.decision_log (HUD Crosswalk Methodology).
provenance.notes: GEOGRAPHY JOIN ONLY — not demand-weighted. NOT Fair Market Rent / Income Limits / CHAS / NCWM. res_ratio retained for Task G cross-county allocation (a ZIP spanning counties has one row per county).
